published_items.title: OpenAI Codex CLI 0.134.0 adds conversation search and MCP OAuth

key_claims.claim: Release tagged 2026-05-26
Local conversation search with case-insensitive matching and result previews
Per-server MCP environment targeting and OAuth for streamable HTTP servers
Concurrent read-only MCP tools when readOnlyHint is set

published_items.title: xAI Grok Build CLI enters early beta for SuperGrok subscribers
published_items.primary_url_note: https://x.ai/news/grok-build-cli returned HTTP 403 in this run

key_claims.claim: Early beta launch date: 2026-05-25
Access limited to SuperGrok and X Premium Plus subscribers at $300/month
CLI uses 2M-token context window
API version grok-build-0.1 available May 20 at $1/$2 per 1M tokens, 256K context

cross_references.role: comparative benchmarks — vendor figures only, no independent audit

published_items.caveats: Primary source returned 403. Grok Build 0.1 SWE-bench 70.8% applies to deprecated grok-code-fast-1, not production grok-build-0.1. xAI staffing turbulence post-SpaceX merger noted in press. Pricing at $300/month significantly above competing tools.

published_items.title: Gemini Spark expands to broader US access at $100/month

key_claims.claim: AI Ultra subscription reduced to $100/month from $250/month
Broader US access to all AI Ultra subscribers starting week of May 26

published_items.caveats: No standalone Google blog post for May 26 broader rollout date; inferred from I/O timeline and corroborating reports. Google's own in-product warning notes sensitive actions may be taken without per-action confirmation. EU/UK launch pending AI Act compliance; Q3 2026 analyst estimate only.

published_items.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash becomes the global default model in Google AI Mode

key_claims.claim: Gemini 3.5 Flash deployed as AI Mode default on May 26
AI Mode: 1 billion monthly users as of May 19
Personal Intelligence expanded to ~200 countries

cross_references.role: no May 26 entry; last entry May 19 GA

published_items.caveats: No standalone Google announcement post for May 26 deployment date. One independent 5-day evaluation published ~May 24 reported Intelligence Index rank #8 and 61% hallucination rate — weaker than Google I/O figures. Audited head-to-head benchmarks not yet available.

published_items.title: Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Korea Representative Director

key_claims.claim: KiYoung Choi appointed Representative Director of Anthropic Korea
Joins from Snowflake where he was General Manager for Korea
Korea: top-5 globally for Claude usage; 3.5x expected rate relative to population
Seoul office = 3rd Asia-Pacific location after Tokyo and Bengaluru

published_items.title: Suno AI raising $250M+ at $5B valuation led by Bond Capital

key_claims.claim: Bond Capital leading round expected to exceed $250M
Valuation target: $5B
Prior round: $250M at $2.45B valuation, November 2025

published_items.caveats: Round not yet closed as of May 26 reporting. Ongoing copyright litigation from major record labels is an unresolved risk. Deal terms may change.

published_items.title: Fireworks AI in funding talks targeting $15B valuation

key_claims.claim: Valuation target: $15B
Previous Series C: $250M at $4B, October 2025

published_items.caveats: Talks only; no term sheet or close announced. Round size not disclosed. Multiple outlets summarizing Bloomberg-sourced reporting; Bloomberg primary not directly accessible.
